ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the assignment belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assignment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the assignment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher leading the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workers" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker */,
  "worker_name" TEXT /* Name of the worker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the worker */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the worker (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the worker registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the worker's last login */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating given to the worker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment to which the question belongs */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple-choice, true/false) */,
  "example_true" TEXT /* Example of a true answer */,
  "example_false" TEXT /* Example of a false answer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description to guide workers in understanding the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question to which the answer belongs */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker who submitted the answer */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the answer */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the answer was submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the answer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the answer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment to which the file belongs */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the data file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker who made the submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment to which the submission belongs */,
  "completion_url" TEXT /* URL for completing the submission */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the submission was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the submission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the submission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questionnaires" (
  "questionnaire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each questionnaire */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment to which the questionnaire belongs */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the questionnaire */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the questionnaire */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the questionnaire was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the questionnaire was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("questionnaire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questionnaires_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questionnaire_questions" (
  "questionnaire_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each questionnaire-question relationship */,
  "questionnaire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the questionnaire */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("questionnaire_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questionnaire_questions_questionnaire_id FOREIGN KEY ("questionnaire_id") REFERENCES questionnaires ("questionnaire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questionnaire_questions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the worker for the assignment */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the worker for the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality record */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission */,
  "score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the submission */,
  "issues" TEXT /* Description of issues found in the submission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data quality was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data quality was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "worker_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability record */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Whether the worker is available for the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the availability was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the availability was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_worker_availability_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_worker_availability_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "worker_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill record */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker */,
  "skill" TEXT /* Skill of the worker (e.g., data annotation, content moderation) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the skill was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the skill was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_worker_skills_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)
